examples: Nipping conflict in the bud by silencing dark propaganda would do a lot of good.
Or a social interaction might go sour, with one marmot nipping or chasing another.
Henry Abbott, TrueHoop: Kevin Love is not just a kid to keep your eye on, he's nipping at Dirk's heels right now.
He repeatedly leaps in the air, nipping at some butterflies that hover above his head.
If they stay as a roughly equal pack nipping at his heels, he will probably win.
